info.name: Runloop Axons API
info.description:
Create and operate Axons — distributed event streams for sequencing, recording, and observing agent interactions. Supports SSE subscriptions, publish, SQL query/batch over event history, and broker bridging to agents running in Devboxes.

Contact Support:
 Name: Runloop AI Support
 Email: support@runloop.ai

query.description: The limit of items to return. Default is 20. Max is 5000.
Load the next page of data starting after the item with the given ID.
If true (default), includes total_count in the response. Set to false to skip the count query for better performance on large datasets.

request.description: [Beta] List events from an axon's event stream, ordered by sequence descending.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: [Beta] Execute a batch of SQL statements against an axon's database.

request.description: [Beta] Execute multiple SQL statements atomically within a single transaction against an axon's SQLite database.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: [Beta] Execute a SQL query against an axon's database.

request.description: [Beta] Execute a single parameterized SQL statement against an axon's SQLite database.

item.name: [Beta] Subscribe to an axon event stream via SSE.

query.description: Sequence number after which to start streaming. Events with sequence > this value are returned. If unset, replay from the beginning.
